div.head: The Chargé in Switzerland (Moffat) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
Sir: Referring to my telegram No. 96 dated October 9, 10 a.m.,Not printed. I have the honor to transmit herewith the letter of the Deputy Secretary General of the League of Nations (C.L. 279 (c) 1930. II)Not reprinted. dated
October 8, 1930, whereby he informs you that he has convened the States that participated in the Conference of February–March 1930 to a second Conference of Concerted Economic Action to meet at Geneva on November 17, 1930, and further points out that should the United States Government desire to designate an official observer or other representative to follow the proceedings of the Conference, as at the February–March Conference, he would be glad to give him the necessary facilities.
